    вњ” [2;9mWrite the structured consistency report to the requested review file[0m

[2mвЂў [0mProcessed the single unread mailbox task for this round.

  I reviewed chapter 2 against chapter 1 plus the updated character sheets, saved the report at [38;5;6mst
ory/[39m

ked read. Stopping
